prompt: Build a TalentBridge Internship Suite that supports end-to-end internship recruiting operations in a fully offline, single-page web application. The Angular UI (English-only) provides role-based workspaces for Candidates, Employers, HR Coordinators, Interviewers, and Administrators, with Angular Router driving a responsive SPA experience across dashboards, job and application views, and an operations console. Employers and HR Coordinators create and manage job postings and interview plans using Form controls with inline validation, while Candidates track applications and upload required documents from a guided “Application Packet” wizard. A Message Center surfaces in-app conversations and event-driven alerts (application received, interview confirmed, schedule changed, offer expiring, document reviewed) with subscription toggles per event type, message aggregation into daily digests, read receipts, and Do Not Disturb windows (e.g., 9:00 PM–7:00 AM local time). Content publishing tools let authorized users draft posts and short updates, apply tags/topics, schedule publishing by date/time, pin priority announcements for 7 days, and moderate comments via a Review Drawer with approve/reject reasons; sensitive-word and anti-spam rules run locally (e.g., blocklisted terms, max 3 links per comment, 30-second posting cooldown). Document and attachment management supports upload/preview/download for PDFs and images, validates MIME type and extension, enforces size limits (25 MB per file, 200 MB per account), applies optional watermarking (name + timestamp) on preview/download, and controls download permission by role and record status. All logic runs in-browser with a frontend service layer that persists data to IndexedDB (primary) and LocalStorage (settings/session), and supports local file export/import (JSON/CSV) using Blob/FileSaver-style browser downloads for backups and device-to-device transfer. Although the system is offline, it still provides “Open API and webhook” capabilities through an in-app Integration Simulator: a REST-like request console and Service Worker fetch interceptor that implements idempotency keys (24-hour retention), rate limiting (60 requests/minute per integration), HMAC signature verification with rotating shared secrets, and callback retry with exponential backoff (up to 5 attempts over 15 minutes) written to an outbound event queue. Multi-role authorization uses RBAC plus simple ABAC rules (organization, department, job ownership, application stage) and writes immutable audit logs (who/what/when) to IndexedDB with search by date range (MM/DD/YYYY) and actor. Security and risk controls include password hashing and salted storage, AES-GCM encryption for sensitive fields via WebCrypto, masking on screen (e.g., SSN last 4 only), XSS-safe rendering and HTML sanitization for posts/comments, login brute-force lockout (5 failures → 15-minute lock), an offline CAPTCHA (time-boxed math challenge), and privilege-escalation detection (alert on role changes outside Admin workflow). Data modeling and metadata governance are built in as a local data dictionary, entity lineage views (Job → Application → Interview → Document), metric definitions (views, favorites, inquiry conversion), and dataset/version snapshots with traceable queries against stored revisions.
